findings.note: 12 scenes, 60s full coverage, 1-2 scenes per script section. Average 5s per scene.
Hero frames identified: opening orbital, the two acknowledgment beats (sc10/sc11 — emotional pivot), closing orbital bookend.
Transition vocabulary disciplined: hard_cut everywhere except sc11->sc12 (slow_dissolve to mark return-to-distance) and the open/close fades.
Lens palette favors 85mm-135mm telephoto for human shots — matches Planet Earth observational grammar.
Support insert rule: NO generated inserts. All 12 clips from stock. Generated content would break the documentary spell — flagged in metadata.
